summary: Created understanding_bank.json with full schema (version, meta, 6 domains at correct levels, 4 migrated concepts with all required fields). Built and ran migrate_glossary.py which maps absorbed→solid and not-absorbed→encountered, assigns domains, and preserves V's descriptions, encounter dates, and usage evidence. Updated pulse_v2_config.json: removed vibe_teacher key and added learning_mode with enabled flag, understanding_bank_path, friction_levels (minimal/standard/full), and default_friction. All 8 success criteria verified programmatically.
decisions: Mapped 'checkpoint' to developer_tooling domain (build workflows, HITL context)
Mapped 'atomic' and 'idempotent' to implementation domain (scripts, APIs, transactions context)
Set last_engaged to date-only (truncated from full ISO timestamp) for consistency
notes_for_orchestrator: glossary.json left untouched per brief — D1.2 handles teaching/ cleanup
